description:
An image viewer that allows you to browse images in folders and compressed files like a book. Powerful customization is available.

An image viewer that allows you to browse images in folders and compressed files like a book. Powerful customization is available.

- Supported image format (bmp, jpg, gif, tiff, png, ico, WIC images)
- Compressed file support (zip, rar, 7z, lzh, cbr, cbz, cb7, ...)
- Recursive compressed file support
- PDF support
- Video play support
- Touch operation supported
- Mouse gesture supported
- Key customization, gesture setting
- Movement, rotation, scaling by dragging
- Loupe mode
- Facing mode
- Full screen mode
- Slide show
- Susie plugin support
- Image drop from web browser
- Command extension by scripts
(2026-07-19)
This is the stable version of NeeView 46.0.
This version runs on .NET 10.
Main changes
- Added Effect Profiles for switching all effect settings at once
- Effects now support multiple layers, plus a new Colorize effect
- Added slideshow UI with detailed controls for navigation, end‑of‑book behavior, auto‑scroll, and animation wait
- Optimized settings file size and improved save‑data formats
- Bookmark folders can now appear as tags in the Bookshelf
- Added Full Desktop Mode spanning all monitors
- Added Task Tray Resident Mode for faster startup
- Expanded Book menu with copy, move, save, and rename operations
- Added Table of Contents to the page list for archives and PDFs
- Default book opening direction is now set at first launch and applied to shortcut initialization
Changelog: Version 46.0
